/home/runner/work/Media-Server-Tools-/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/media-dashboard.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/media-dashboard.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/media-dashboard.dir/src/dashboard.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/media-dashboard.dir/src/utils.cpp.o" -o bin/media-dashboard
